segment.source: Renders a consent region with a heading, rich-text message, a checkbox list of cookie categories (each with name, description, and a required flag), Accept-all and Save-preferences buttons, plus a privacy policy link. Use it for: cookie consent copy, consent category lists (essential, analytics, marketing), tracking opt-in text from privacy or legal documents. Prefer 'Cookie Consent Banner' for a simple dismissible notice without per-category checkboxes; use 'Privacy Notice' for full policy summaries.
